title: EGS-v1 relationship graph schema handoff; illustrative FL regulator edges; demote VERIFIED edge claims
handoff_scope: EGS-v1 schema + vocabulary + illustrative edge suite for migration pipeline
reason: Digital twin needs typed directional edges for mechanical/electrical/procedural dependencies. Operator claimed VERIFIED_EVIDENCE on edges and validated removal sequence while OEM WSM/EWD remain NOT_ACQUIRED — schema can hand off; instances stay ILLUSTRATIVE.
decision: Authorize EDTS Relationship Graph Standard EGS-v1 as non-kernel research/ops schema — do NOT mutate frozen schemas/assembly-relationship.schema.json.
Closed edge vocabulary only (BOLTED_TO, MOUNTED_TO, HINGES_ON, SUPPORTS, OVERLAPS, CONTAINS, CONNECTED_TO, ROUTES_THROUGH, PASSES_BEHIND, INTERFERES_WITH, SLIDES_ALONG, BLOCKS_REMOVAL_OF).
Admit REL-000001..000007 (aliases REL-REG-01..06 + REL-FL-DOOR-0104) as ILLUSTRATIVE_ONLY; demote operator VERIFIED_EVIDENCE / DOCUMENT_SUPPORTED without hashed SRC-CAND bytes.
Regulator removal sequence is ILLUSTRATIVE_ONLY / NOT_EXECUTED as workshop procedure.
Upgrade evidence matrix with property_confidence fields; demote operator VERIFIED/OEM_VERIFIED/SIMULATION_VERIFIED cells without hashes.
Create MISN-000002 (dashboard edge mapping) NOT_STARTED — secondary to MISN-000001 / KG-001.
Register KG-004 (hinge shim interfaces) OPEN HIGH.
Recommended decision IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_READY for schema package to migration pipeline — not for verified silo removal automation.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
